payload.answer: I’m not confident enough to resolve the ambiguous Sam note automatically. Please choose how you want it handled.
repair_options: Keep the note as-is and do not change any existing memory.
Treat this as a new, separate note about Sam without merging it with anything else.
If there are two possible Sams, specify which Sam this refers to so I can disambiguate.
If this note should replace an older Sam fact, provide the exact superseded fact and the replacement wording.
If this is a duplicate of an existing Sam memory, indicate which existing memory it matches.
